cost.details: Expend Beastshift charges to upcast Sporesphere

system.description:
You can expend Beastshift charges to upcast your spores. Each charge expended can either increase the damage die size or add the Blinded or Poisoned condition.

Foundry tip — while you own this feature, the Sporesphere dialog automatically offers a Decay panel: enter the number of die-size bumps and tick Blinded / Poisoned. Beastshift charges are tracked manually; the chat card flavor records the spend.
